name: Crisp Beat
explanation: A crisp, dry, punchy digital drum machine in the Roland TR-707 / 727 lineage and the clean opposite of the warm Velvet Rhythm: a tight clicky kick, a snappy bright snare, crisp closed and open hats, a layered hand-clap and a short cowbell, all synthesised in real time. Like the original it is a preset PATTERN box: hold a note to start an internal 16-step four-on-the-floor groove, release to stop and let the tails ring. Controls: Tune (kick pitch), Decay, Snap (snare noise vs tone), Hat (hat brightness and length), Accent and Level.
